target_capability: Improve fresh-agent Startup YC operating judgment without trap regression or broad-transfer overclaiming.
forbidden_actions: mutate benchmark weights to create a score gain
publish network-absorbable packets from focused transfer evidence
write secrets or access tokens into artifacts
allowed_actions: patch Startup YC packets with causal weak-case lineage
add fresh or seeded-variance benchmark scenarios
write evidence docs and Swarm packets with known limits
keep_condition: Keep only benchmark-backed improvements with positive candidate delta, no trap regression, clear doctrine lineage, and no widened authority.
reject_rule: Reject no-gain, score-cosmetic, metric-mutating, trap-regressing, or broad-claim candidates.
rollback_condition: Revert any promoted packet or adapter if a full-suite repeat loses positive validated-pack mean delta, seeded-variance min delta turns negative, or trap regression appears.
promotion_condition: Promote only to the weakest evidence tier supported by benchmark, absorption, trap, transfer, provenance, privacy, and rollback evidence.
diagnosis_when_zero_keeps: report whether candidate generation produced causal mechanisms
report whether mutation surface is too narrow
report whether benchmark cannot see the intended improvement
